scan_table_check.description: A script field can be part of custom tables or added to existing tables for various reasons. Any server-side script execution however is a potential vulnerability. Editing server-side executable scripts should be limited to users that have the admin role - even if the field is contained in a record that can be edited by non-admin users.
scan_table_check.name: CodeSanity - Script Field Access
scan_table_check.resolution_details: A "Deny Unless" ACL should be added for the script field that limits write access to users that have the admin role.
scan_table_check.short_description: Script fields must only be editable by admin users
